---
title: 'Maturity Looks Ahead'
date: '2011-09-07T03:44:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1001806323482293816'
blogger_filename: '/2011/09/maturity-looks-ahead.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Daily Reading'
---

<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/past-present-future-794cf64df5c8.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/past-present-future-794cf64df5c8.jpg" /></a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;">How many minutes, hours, or days have I spent thinking about the past? "Man wasn't that a great time..." or "If only I hadn't have done xyz I could be so much further along..." The past, your successes and failures, is always a chain to your future. You can learn from the past failures, even use them as examples of what not to do, or repeat. You can learn from the past successes and&nbsp;implement&nbsp;those tools, trades, or abilities to succeed again. Much of what we do is built experience by experience. However sometimes there is a danger in the past. It becomes a&nbsp;hindrance&nbsp;when you are tempted to spend time reviewing the past so much that you are then replaying it. Images, videos and audio in the mind, replaying what you did or didn't do. The glory days as on the football team, or the low days on the streets.</span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"><i><br /></i></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"><b><i><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#/left:passage/esv/philippians/3/">Philippians 3:13-15 (ESV)</a>(emphasis added)</i></b></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"><i>Brothers, I do not consider that I have made it my own. But <b>ONE THING</b> I do: <b>forgetting what lies behind and straining forward to what lies ahead, I press</b> on toward the goal for the prize of the upward call of God in Christ (The Anointed One and His Anointing) Jesus. Let those of us who are mature think this way, and if in anything you think otherwise, God will reveal that also to you.&nbsp;</i></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"><br /></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;">I must learn to apply pressure to my future. Change&nbsp;requires&nbsp;change. </span><a href="http://www.heritagefamilyfellowship.net/" style="font-size: 17px;">Pastor Art Aragon&nbsp;</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;">says that </span><i style="font-size: 17px;">"change requires change, if you want to change you have to change or it wouldn't be change." </i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;">You can't do that same thing over and over expecting different results, that's insanity. Many times the problems of life attempt to apply pressure on us. </span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#/left:passage/nkjv/mark/4/" style="font-size: 17px;">Mark 4</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"> talks about them </span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#/left:passage/nkjv/mark/4/" style="font-size: 17px;">choking the Word</a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"> in us. To choke something is to apply pressure until it dies by&nbsp;suffocation. So in order to remove myself from the pressure of life I must begin to apply pressure to my future instead; to push back against the pressure pressing me.&nbsp;</span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"><br /></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;">I apply pressure to my future by engaging my dreams daily. As I enter into the <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#/left:passage/nkjv/psalms/91/">secret place of the Most High</a>, He begins to speak to me. He tells me things about himself, and about my future and about my present. He gives me insights, ideas, and witty&nbsp;</span></span><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;">inventions. He gives the ability to see something no one else sees, or in a way no one else sees it. There are unique things I was called to do on this planet, in this life. <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#/left:passage/nkjv/jeremiah/1:5/">He called me to do these things before the earth was created!</a> My time in the presence of God, in prayer and study and meditation of His Word brings me to a place that I can hear him and walk it out. &nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span><br /><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"><br /></span></span><br /><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/business-tower-2-18ba37066e9a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/business-tower-2-18ba37066e9a.jpg" /></a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;">However, if I gain a grand revelation and forget about it by noon and then don't do anything about it again for three years... it will have profited me nothing. <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#/left:passage/esv/james/2:14-19/">Faith without works is dead</a>. So then what must I do to work things out that I hear from Him? Especially, what do I do when the dream or vision of a project or calling is so big that I can't begin to fathom how He could ever bring that to pass in my life? How does the person flipping burgers having visions from God of a multi-million dollar business begin?&nbsp;</span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"><br /></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#/left:passage/nkjv/deuteronomy/30:14/">But the word is very near you, in your mouth and in your heart, that you may do it</a>. I must <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#/left:passage/nkjv/joshua/1:8/">meditate on the Word of God day and night that I may do it,</a> not just the bible which is of course the HIGHEST authority and must never be contradicted, but also the word I hear from Him in prayer.&nbsp;</span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"><br /></span></span><br /><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/mountain-mover-8f32392dc390.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/mountain-mover-8f32392dc390.jpg" /></a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;">This can be done many ways, it can be done by taking a picture that reminds me of that calling/mission/vision and post it on the wall, door, etc.&nbsp;Every time&nbsp;I see it I can thank God for bringing it to pass in His timing. But whatever the tool, the principle is the same. Keep it before me, meditate it, keep it in my mouth, which brings it into the heart, which comes back out as Faith. <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#/left:passage/nkjv/matthew/21:21/">Speak to the mountain</a>, daily. I must begin to use my imagination to work for me and not against me. I must imagine days of too much blessing, instead of days of not enough. I, and I alone, must be responsible for my future, through Him who called. He will do the work, if I will do the believing. That is my work. My work is to do all I can to build my believer muscle until I can't believe anything else but that which he has called me to. The work of the believer is to enter into the rest. It's a heart AND mind matter. Selah...Pause and think about it, meditate it, ponder it...</span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"><br /></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"><br /></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"><br /></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;">DW</span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: arial;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 17px;"><br /></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold;"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#" style="background-color: #660000; text-decoration: none;">Hebrews 4:11 NKJV</a></span><br /><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;">Let us therefore be diligent to&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">enter</span>&nbsp;that&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">rest</span>, lest anyone fall according to the same example of disobedience.</span></span></div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;"><br /></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white; font-family: arial; font-size: 12px;"></span></span><br /><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">   <span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;"><br /></span></span></h4><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">   <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#" style="background-color: #660000; text-decoration: underline;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;">Hebrews 4:3 NKJV</span></a></h4><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;">For we who have believed do&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">enter</span>&nbsp;that&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">rest</span>, as He has said: "So I swore in My wrath, 'They shall not&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">enter</span>&nbsp;My&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">rest</span>,' " although the works were finished from the foundation of the world.</span></span></div><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;"><br /></span></span></div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;"><br /></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white; font-family: arial; font-size: 12px;"></span></span><br /><ul style="list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; list-style-type: none; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 10px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 15px; padding-top: 0px;"><li style="list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; list-style-type: none; margin-bottom: 15px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">   <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#" style="background-color: #660000; text-decoration: none;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;">John 17:24 NKJV</span></a></h4><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;">Father, I desire that they also whom You gave Me may be with Me where I am, that they may behold My glory which You have given Me; for You loved Me&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">before</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">the</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">foundation</span>&nbsp;of&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">the</span>&nbsp;world.</span></span></div><div class="QuickLinks" style="margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#" style="background-color: #660000; text-decoration: none;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;">Read John 17</span></a></div></li><li style="list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; list-style-type: none; margin-bottom: 15px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">   <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#" style="background-color: #660000; text-decoration: none;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;">Ephesians 1:4 NKJV</span></a></h4><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;">just as He chose us in Him&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">before</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">the</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">foundation</span>&nbsp;of&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">the</span>&nbsp;world, that we should be holy and without blame&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">before</span>&nbsp;Him in love,</span></span></div><div class="QuickLinks" style="margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#" style="background-color: #660000; text-decoration: none;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;">Read Ephesians 1</span></a></div></li><li style="list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; list-style-type: none; margin-bottom: 15px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">   <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#" style="background-color: #660000; text-decoration: none;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;">1 Peter 1:20 NKJV</span></a></h4><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;">He indeed was foreordained&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">before</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">the</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">foundation</span>&nbsp;of&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">the</span>&nbsp;world, but was manifest in these last times for you</span></span></div><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;"><br /></span></span></div><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white; font-size: 12px;"></span></span><br /><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">  <span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000; color: white; font-size: 12px;"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#" style="text-decoration: underline;">Jeremiah 1:5 NKJV</a></span></h4><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;"></span></span></span><br /><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;">"<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">Before</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">I</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">formed</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">you</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">in</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">the</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">womb</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">I</span>&nbsp;knew&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">you</span>;&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">Before</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">you</span>were born&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">I</span>&nbsp;sanctified&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">you</span>;&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">I</span>&nbsp;ordained&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">you</span>&nbsp;a prophet to&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">the</span>&nbsp;nations."</span></span></span></div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px;"></span><br /><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;"><br /></span></span></span></div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px;"><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white; font-size: 12px;"></span></span><br /><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">  <span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000; color: white; font-size: 12px;"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#" style="text-decoration: none;">Romans 11:29 NKJV</a></span></h4><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;"></span></span></span><br /><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;">For the gifts and the&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">calling</span>&nbsp;of God are irrevocable.</span></span></span></div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px;"></span><br /><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white;"><br /></span></span></span></div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px;"><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white; font-size: 12px;"></span></span><br /><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">  <span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000; color: white; font-size: 12px;"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#" style="text-decoration: none;">Ephesians 1:18 NKJV</a></span></h4><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white; font-size: 12px;"></span><br /><div class="ResultText" style="background-color: #660000; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white; font-size: 12px;">the eyes of your understanding being enlightened; that you may know what is the hope of His&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">calling</span>, what are the riches of the glory of His inheritance in the saints,</span></div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white; font-size: 12px;"></span><br /><div class="ResultText" style="background-color: #660000; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white; font-size: 12px;"><br /></span></div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: white; font-size: 12px;"><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><div style="background-color: #660000;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px;"></span></div><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">  <span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000; font-size: 12px;"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/my-bible/#" style="text-decoration: none;">2 Timothy 1:9 NKJV</a></span></h4><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;"></span></span><br /><div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #660000;">who has saved us and called us with a holy&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">calling</span>, not according to our works, but according to His own purpose and grace which was given to us in Christ Jesus before time began,</span></span></div></div></span></div></span></div></span></div></li></ul>
